title: Axolotl
description: The axolotl (Ambystoma mexicanum) is a critically endangered, fully aquatic salamander native only to the Lake Xochimilco area near Mexico City. Famous for "never growing up" they exhibit neoteny, meaning they retain larval features like external gills and a tail fin throughout their lives. They are renowned for their incredible ability to regenerate lost limbs and organs.

title: clownfish
description: this is a clownfish. clownfishes are very cute. they like to snuggle with sea anemones. this clownfish is named Amelia.

title: Dinosaur Bone
description: A massive fossilized bone fragment. It belonged to a creature that roamed the earth 65 million years ago.

title: Saturn
description: This is the planet Saturn. Saturn is really cool because it has a giant ring around it. Did you know Saturn has 274 moons! Earth only has one moon. I want to give Saturn a nickname. His nickname is Scarborough.

title: Ancient Vase
description: A beautifully crafted vase from a forgotten era. It has strange markings on the side that look like tiny birds.
